items.title: World Liberty Financial treasury company AI Financial warns in SEC filing that it may not survive the year
items.summary: The former Alt5 Sigma marked its 7.28 billion WLFI tokens at $706 million, down from a roughly $1.46 billion cost basis, while disclosing that the holdings remain locked amid liquidity concerns.

items.title: SEC to make ‘innovation exemption’ for tokenized stock trading: Report
items.summary: Several SEC officials reportedly didn’t support the decision, while tokenization platform Securitize flagged risks with enabling third-party platforms to issue tokenized stocks.

items.title: Bitcoin faces outsized quantum threat as computing breakthroughs accelerate, Citi says
items.summary: The bank said accelerating advances in quantum computing are compressing the timeline for risks to crypto and broader internet infrastructure, with Bitcoin seen as particularly exposed.

items.title: The three risks that could overwhelm bitcoin's regulatory tailwind
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for May 18, 2026

items.title: Bitcoin slides below $77,000 as Trump’s Iran warning rattles risk assets
items.summary: Bitcoin and ether sank after the U.S. president told Iran the “clock is ticking,” sending oil higher and triggering broad crypto liquidations.

items.title: Odds against rate cuts high as new US Fed chair set for swearing in
items.summary: Many experts voiced concerns that the confirmation of Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair would lead to uncertainty about the central bank’s independence, particularly in setting interest rates.

items.title: XRP price may explode to $15 amid 'quiet accumulation,' analyst claims
items.summary: XRP still faces short-term downside risk, with a symmetrical triangle breakdown pointing to a possible drop toward $1.00–$1.10.

items.title: Trailmark turns code into graphs
items.summary: We’re open-sourcing Trailmark, a library that parses source code into a queryable call graph of functions, classes, call relationships, and semantic metadata, then exposes that graph through a Python API that Claude skills can call directly. Install it now: uv pip install trailma

items.title: Bitcoin has shed $5,000 within days. ETF flows, derivatives say the selloff could worsen
items.summary: Bitcoin has fallen about 6% from $82,000 to $76,800, and underlying data point to the drop being more than a routine pullback.

items.title: Republican lawmakers call for permanent CBDC ban as House vote approaches
items.summary: Tom Emmer, the House majority whip, is also advocating for his Anti-CBDC Surveillance State Act, which has passed the House but has yet to pass the Senate.

items.title: Ethereum Foundation sees 2 more high-profile departures
items.summary: Ethereum Foundation researchers Julian Ma and Carl Beek have resigned, bringing the total number of major departures from the nonprofit to at least eight in 2026.

items.title: About 10% of Americans used crypto in 2025, highest level since 2022: Fed
items.summary: Among those who used crypto for payments, over 25% said they did so because the business preferred crypto, citing speed, privacy and lower cost advantages.

items.title: Echo Protocol's eBTC exploited for $77M in admin key compromise
items.summary: The hacker has already laundered nearly 5% of the loot through Tornado Cash and is still holding the remaining 955 eBTC.

items.title: Ether pullback was ‘attractive opportunity’ for 71,672 ETH buy: Bitmine’s Lee
items.summary: Bitmine chairman Tom Lee said the company is expected to have accumulated 5% of Ether's total supply before the end of the year.

items.title: SEC to propose tokenized stock framework as Wall Street efforts deepen: Bloomberg
items.summary: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission is reportedly poised to release a major crypto proposal as it seeks to institute its digital assets agenda.

items.title: Minnesotan banks and credit unions set to provide crypto custody Aug. 1
items.summary: Minnesota established the midwest’s first unified digital asset safety net for banks and credit unions.

items.title: Hyperliquid's USDC deal could supercharge HYPE, pressure Circle, Coinbase margins, analysts say
items.summary: The revenue share deal could shift an estimated $160 million in revenue from Coinbase and Circle into Hyperliquid's ecosystem, Compass Point analysts said.

items.title: Revolut wants to take Dogecoin mainstream with its new physical payment card
items.summary: The European fintech giant is launching a physical debit card that lets users spend the popular meme coin anywhere Visa and Mastercard are accepted with zero extra exchange fees.

items.title: Solana is shedding its memecoin reputation as big banks move billions into its ecosystem
items.summary: Wall Street and payment giants are quietly taking over Solana, moving billions onto the network for tokenized funds and global payments even as the broader crypto market cools down, according to a new report by Messari.

items.title: The Ethereum Foundation is facing a wave of high-profile departures as its internal shakeup deepens
items.summary: The turnover comes as the foundation undergoes an internal transition tied to a new organizational mandate aimed at redefining its role within Ethereum.
